Title: Directs the superintendent of the department of financial services to conduct a study on the utilization of the cryptocurrency, bitcoin, for the purchasing of life insurance and annuities
Summary: Directs the superintendent of the department of financial services to conduct a study on the utilization of the cryptocurrency, bitcoin, for the purchasing of life insurance and annuities; provides for a report to the governor and the legislature.
ActClause: AN ACT directing the superintendent of the department of financial services to conduct a study on the utilization of the cryptocurrency, bitcoin, for the purchasing of life insurance and annuities
